positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration featuring a majestic celestial fox (kitsune) surrounded by glowing lunar flora and abstract stardust. The fox should have a sleek, elegant silhouette and ethereal luminescence. Compositionally, the fox should be centered and looking upwards towards a crescent moon backdrop. Use a highly contrasting color palette of deep indigo, brilliant cosmic teal, warm gold, and soft lavender. The art style must be vector-graphic, neo-oriental fantasy illustration, optimized for screen and print. High contrast, clean lines, symmetrical balance, negative space utilization is key. Focus on sharp edges and geometric shapes.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low resolution, dirty, grunge, photorealism, 3d render, ugly, grainy
